name: human-context-writer
description: A writing plugin that teaches agents to gather context, audit AI-like writing patterns, match the user's voice, and rewrite text without changing the meaning.

interface.shortDescription: Rewrite, draft, summarize, and explain text in a natural human voice.
interface.longDescription: Human Context Writer gives agents a concrete editorial workflow: understand the purpose, audience, medium, tone, language, and must-keep details; audit the draft for common AI-writing patterns; preserve the user's meaning and voice; then produce a clearer, more specific final version. It is based on the same kind of AI-pattern cleanup approach used by humanizer-style writing skills, expanded for emails, GitHub writing, documentation, social posts, summaries, product copy, and technical explanations.
defaultPrompt: Audit this draft for AI-like writing patterns and rewrite it in a natural human voice.
Ask clarifying questions about purpose, audience, and tone, then improve this text.
Make this writing clearer, more specific, and less generic while preserving the original meaning.
